mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, directly increasing present equity valuations and generating positive forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 24-month rolling window, or forward returns during rate cuts are not significantly positive (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment crossing above 5.0 percent signals labor market deterioration and reduced household consumption, which compresses corporate earnings and produces negative equity returns.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns exceed zero in more than 55 percent of triggered instances, or the signal loses statistical significance after controlling for market volatility.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous acceleration in consumer price inflation and deceleration in retail sales indicates demand destruction driven by rising prices, leading to negative forward equity returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative returns when CPIAUCSL rises and RSAFS falls, with a hit rate below 40 percent over a 3-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production expanding above its three-month moving average signals supply-side recovery and improved capacity utilization, generating positive short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Forward five-day returns are negative or flat in 60 percent of expansionary observations, or the mechanism shows no predictive power outside recovery periods.

mechanism_narrative: Rising nonfarm payrolls indicate strengthening economic activity and expanding corporate revenue bases, which directly supports higher equity valuations and positive forward returns.
failure_condition: Rank correlation between payroll growth and forward returns remains below 0.01 across all tested windows, or positive returns do not materialize during payroll expansions.

mechanism_narrative: Monthly inflation exceeding 0.5 percent triggers expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, which compresses equity multiples and yields negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive in over 50 percent of high-inflation months, or the signal predictive accuracy drops below random chance after 2020.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in housing starts and real GDP growth confirm broad-based domestic demand expansion, driving corporate earnings expectations higher and producing positive returns.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields negative forward returns in more than 55 percent of cases, or the interaction term shows no incremental predictive value over individual series.

mechanism_narrative: Stabilization of the unemployment rate after a cyclical peak signals recession bottoming and reduced downside risk, prompting market repricing and positive short-term returns.
failure_condition: Forward five-day returns are negative in 65 percent of stabilization instances, or the mechanism fails to outperform a buy-and-hold benchmark during trough periods.
